description: Runtime saturation signal over moltnet-metrics. Start with service.name, then inspect recent traces/logs for long-running handlers, embedding/model calls, or workflow bursts. Values are seconds.
mplQuery:
`moltnet-metrics`:`nodejs.eventloop.delay.p99`
| align to 1m using max
| group by `service.name` using max
name: MoltNet event loop pressure by service
